overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval town at night. The journey crosses a stone bridge, passes through a covered gate tunnel, and continues along a waterfront path illuminated by torchlight against a moody blue-green night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge leading to medieval town gate

events.description: approaching and entering the covered stone gate tunnel

agents.ego_description: riding a horse across a cobblestone bridge toward a fortified town gate

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the gate entrance holding a torch

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with low stone parapet walls
large stone archway entrance to the town with wooden portcullis
burning torches mounted on stone pillars along the bridge
medieval houses with timber framing and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark night with the camera following a white-haired rider on horseback crossing a cobblestone bridge. The bridge leads toward an imposing stone gate archway, with torch lanterns providing warm orange light against the cool blue night. A guard stands watch near the entrance as the rider approaches the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone gate tunnel with vaulted ceiling

events.description: entering the darker tunnel area lit only by wall-mounted torches
exiting the tunnel to the open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: riding through the enclosed stone tunnel beneath the town gate

notable_agents.action: guard walking with a torch along the tunnel wall

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the gate tunnel
arched stone ceiling of the tunnel
iron torch holders mounted on the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The rider enters the covered stone tunnel, where the lighting shifts to warm torchlight against dark stone walls. The enclosed space features a vaulted ceiling and guards patrolling with torches. The camera follows the horse through the archway until emerging at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade alongside river with overhanging trees

events.description: exiting the tunnel onto a waterfront path with river visible on the right
descending stone steps to the lower waterfront level
ascending stone stairs along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: riding along the waterfront path beside a river, navigating stone steps

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a torch walking along the water's edge

entered.detail: dark flowing water alongside the path reflecting torchlight
low stone wall separating the path from the water
tall trees with dense foliage overhanging the path
medieval brick and timber houses lining the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a waterfront promenade with a river on the right and medieval buildings on the left. The rider descends stone steps and continues along the cobblestone path, passing under trees and alongside the water. The path features periodic stone staircases as it follows the riverbank, with torch lanterns providing illumination along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open cobblestone bridge through a confined stone gateway and out onto a moonlit waterfront promenade. It begins with a white-haired rider crossing a bridge under a cool blue night sky, moving toward an imposing stone archway illuminated by warm orange torch lanterns. As the rider enters the covered tunnel, the environment shifts into an enclosed space of vaulted ceilings and dark stone walls patrolled by guards. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the archway, descending stone steps to reveal a riverbank path flanked by medieval buildings. Finally, the movement continues along the cobblestone waterfront, passing under trees and periodic staircases lit by flickering torches against the moody night atmosphere.
